lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਾ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਅਤਿ ਘਨਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kathaa keeratan har at ghanaa sukh sehaj bisraam |3|
lines.english: The Sermon and the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are sung there very often; there is peace, poise and tranquility. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਬਸੰਤ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਹ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su thaan basant dhan jeh japeeai naam |
lines.english: Blessed is that place, and blessed are those who dwell there, where they chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤੇ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਅਨਾਥ ਕੋ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: man te kade na veesarai anaath ko naath |
lines.english: In my mind, I never forget the Lord; He is the Master of the masterless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹਾਥ ॥੪॥੨੯॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee jaa kai sabh kichh haath |4|29|59|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God; everything is in His hands. ||4||29||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਸੀਤਲ ਹੋਤਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa simar charanaarabind seetal hotaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Contemplate His Lotus Feet forever, and you shall be cooled and soothed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਬੰਧਿ ਕਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਫੁਨਿ ਸੁਖ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin too bandh kar chhoddiaa fun sukh meh paaeaa |
lines.english: The One who bound you in the womb and then released you, placed you in the world of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹੁ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਕੋਊ ਤਿਸ ਸਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin ehu rachan rachaaeaa koaoo tis siau rang laavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He created this creation, but rare are those who enshrine love for Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਅਥਵਾ ਮੁਇਆ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeevatiaa athavaa mueaa kichh kaam na aavai |
lines.english: In life and in death, this Maya is of no use.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਉਸਨ ਸੀਤ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੈ ਘਾਮ ਤੇ ਕਾਢੈ ॥
lines.translit: re praanee usan seet karataa karai ghaam te kaadtai |
lines.english: O mortal, the Creator Lord made summer and winter; He saves you from the heat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰੀ ਤੇ ਹਸਤੀ ਕਰੈ ਟੂਟਾ ਲੇ ਗਾਢੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: keeree te hasatee karai ttoottaa le gaadtai |2|
lines.english: From the ant, He makes an elephant; He reunites those who have been separated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤ ਕਮਾਵਨ ਸਰਬ ਫਲ ਰਵੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kirat kamaavan sarab fal raveeai har nirat |3|
lines.english: It is fruitful for all to practice contemplation of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਉਤਭੁਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਕਿਰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: anddaj jeraj setaj utabhujaa prabh kee ih kirat |
lines.english: Eggs, wombs, sweat and earth - these are God's workshops of creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਤੇ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵਨਾ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਧ ॥
lines.translit: ham te kachhoo na hovanaa saran prabh saadh |
lines.english: I cannot do anything; O God, I seek the Sanctuary of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਕੂਪ ਅੰਧ ਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਕਾਢ ॥੪॥੩੦॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: moh magan koop andh te naanak gur kaadt |4|30|60|
lines.english: Guru Nanak pulled me up, out of the deep, dark pit, the intoxication of attachment. ||4||30||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਛਲ ਅਛੇਦ ਅਭੇਦ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਐਸੇ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: achhal achhed abhed prabh aise bhagavaan |1|
lines.english: He is undeceivable, imperishable, inscrutable; such is my Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਮੈ ਫਿਰਾ ਖੋਜਉ ਬਨ ਥਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat mai firaa khojau ban thaan |
lines.english: Searching, searching, I wander around searching, in the woods and other places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਨ ਤੇ ਸੁਪਨਾ ਭਲਾ ਬਸੀਐ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaagan te supanaa bhalaa baseeai prabh sang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Even better than being awake, is the dream in which I dwell with God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਦੇਖਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਨਾ ਆਤਮ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: kab dekhau prabh aapanaa aatam kai rang |
lines.english: When shall I behold my God, and delight my soul?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਨ ਪੰਚ ਤਤ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਬਿਨਾਸ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: roop na rekh na panch tat tthaakur abinaas |2|
lines.english: He has no form or outline, and He is not made of the five elements; our Lord and Master is imperishable. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨ ਆਸ੍ਰਮ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਸੁਨਉ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: baran aasram saasatr sunau darasan kee piaas |
lines.english: Listening to the Shaastras teaching about the four social classes and the four stages of life, I grow thirsty for the Blessed Vision of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੇ ਧਨਿ ਧਨਿ ਤੇ ਈਸੁਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jaa kau mile dhan dhan te eesur |3|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are they, whom the Lord meets in His Mercy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਸੰਤਨ ਕਹਹਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਜੋਗੀਸੁਰ ॥
lines.translit: ohu saroop santan kaheh virale jogeesur |
lines.english: How rare are those Saints and great Yogis, who describe the beautiful form of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਰਮਾ ॥੪॥੩੧॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tis prabh bhettiaa jaa ke pooran karamaa |4|31|61|
lines.english: O Nanak, God meets those, whose karma is perfect. ||4||31||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਤਹ ਭਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: so antar so baahare binase teh bharamaa |
lines.english: They know that He is deep within, and outside as well; their doubts are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਜੁ ਉਤਾਰਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕਰਿ ਆਹਰੁ ਆਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karaj utaariaa satiguroo kar aahar aap |1|
lines.english: The True Guru has paid off my debt; He Himself did it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਭਏ ਦੇਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant suprasan bhe dekh prabh parataap |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are totally pleased, gazing on God's glorious radiance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਖਰਚਤ ਨਿਬਹਤ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਅਖੂਟ ॥
lines.translit: khaat kharachat nibahat rahai gurasabad akhoott |
lines.english: Eating and expending it, it is always available; the Word of the Guru's Shabad is inexhaustible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਸਮਗਰੀ ਕਬਹੂ ਨਹੀ ਤੂਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooran bhee samagaree kabahoo nahee toott |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Everything is perfectly arranged; it is never exhausted. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਅਰਥ ਅਰੁ ਕਾਮ ਮੋਖ ਦੇਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dharam arath ar kaam mokh dete nahee baar |2|
lines.english: He does not hesitate to bless me with Dharmic faith, wealth, fulfilment of desires and liberation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਆਰਾਧਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਧਿ ਆਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang aaraadhanaa har nidh aapaar |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I worship and adore the Lord, the infinite treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਹੀ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan sanchiaa jaa kaa nahee sumaar |3|
lines.english: They gather in the wealth of the Lord's Name, which cannot be estimated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਅਰਾਧਹਿ ਏਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat araadheh ek rang gobind gupaal |
lines.english: The devotees worship and adore the Lord of the Universe with single-minded love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: saran pare prabh tereea prabh kee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: O God, I seek Your Sanctuary, the glorious greatness of God. Nanak:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਗੁਸਾਈ ॥੪॥੩੨॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ant na paaeeai beant gusaaee |4|32|62|
lines.english: Your end or limitation cannot be found, O Infinite World-Lord. ||4||32||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਕਾਰਜ ਭਏ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar pooran prabhoo kaaraj bhe raas |
lines.english: Meditate, meditate in remembrance of the Perfect Lord God, and your affairs shall be perfectly resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾਰ ਪੁਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਵਸੈ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karataar pur karataa vasai santan kai paas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In Kartaarpur, the City of the Creator Lord, the Saints dwell with the Creator. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਾਇ ਭਗਤਨ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rakhavaalaa gobind raae bhagatan kee raas |1|
lines.english: The Sovereign Lord of the Universe is the Saving Grace, the Protector of the capital of His devotees. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਕੋਊ ਲਾਗਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: bighan na koaoo laagataa gur peh aradaas |
lines.english: No obstacles will block your way, when you offer your prayers to the Guru.
